records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Dame Liv.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Dame Liv.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Dame Liv.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Deputy. Just got here? I was just placing flowers for the old guys.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Deputy. Just got here? I was just placing flowers for the old guys.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Deputy. Just got here? I was just placing flowers for the old guys.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The ladies were nagging me nonstop to use their favorite flowers, you know? Took me forever to find them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The ladies were nagging me nonstop to use their favorite flowers, you know? Took me forever to find them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The ladies were nagging me nonstop to use their favorite flowers, you know? Took me forever to find them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They wouldn't even care about flowers like this...
records.m_Talk_DEU: They wouldn't even care about flowers like this...
records.m_Talk_FRA: They wouldn't even care about flowers like this...

records.m_Talk_ENG: They probably... wouldn't give a damn...
records.m_Talk_DEU: They probably... wouldn't give a damn...
records.m_Talk_FRA: They probably... wouldn't give a damn...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arius, are you cold? Should we head back in?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arius, are you cold? Should we head back in?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arius, are you cold? Should we head back in?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, I'm okay, Sir Hansol. Everyone else is holding back their pain too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, I'm okay, Sir Hansol. Everyone else is holding back their pain too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, I'm okay, Sir Hansol. Everyone else is holding back their pain too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even just a little, I want to help ease that pain for them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even just a little, I want to help ease that pain for them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even just a little, I want to help ease that pain for them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...All right. But don't push yourself too hard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...All right. But don't push yourself too hard.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...All right. But don't push yourself too hard.

records.m_Talk_ENG: O knights of steel resolve and unyielding courage...
records.m_Talk_DEU: O knights of steel resolve and unyielding courage...
records.m_Talk_FRA: O knights of steel resolve and unyielding courage...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though you've returned as cold, lifeless ashes...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though you've returned as cold, lifeless ashes...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though you've returned as cold, lifeless ashes...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The vow you left behind will shine as a beacon of hope, lighting our path.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The vow you left behind will shine as a beacon of hope, lighting our path.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The vow you left behind will shine as a beacon of hope, lighting our path.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rest now from your weary battles, and may you become stars in the sky, forever at peace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rest now from your weary battles, and may you become stars in the sky, forever at peace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rest now from your weary battles, and may you become stars in the sky, forever at peace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Knights.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Knights.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Knights.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A moment of silence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A moment of silence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A moment of silence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ozymandias! Where do you think you're going in that condition?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ozymandias! Where do you think you're going in that condition?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ozymandias! Where do you think you're going in that condition?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are the only Administration confirmed Grade S Counter in this city.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are the only Administration confirmed Grade S Counter in this city.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are the only Administration confirmed Grade S Counter in this city.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Senior is dead, and you're acting like this?! Unacceptable!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Senior is dead, and you're acting like this?! Unacceptable!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Senior is dead, and you're acting like this?! Unacceptable!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be ridiculous. You think I can just lie down and sleep through all this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be ridiculous. You think I can just lie down and sleep through all this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be ridiculous. You think I can just lie down and sleep through all this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm the one who screwed up at the critical moment...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm the one who screwed up at the critical moment...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm the one who screwed up at the critical moment...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How arrogant. Even if you are an Administration confirmed Grade S Counter, it'll prove difficult to take me on by yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How arrogant. Even if you are an Administration confirmed Grade S Counter, it'll prove difficult to take me on by yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How arrogant. Even if you are an Administration confirmed Grade S Counter, it'll prove difficult to take me on by yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Plus, you have laid down your title as champion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Plus, you have laid down your title as champion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Plus, you have laid down your title as champion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What more meaning would the dishonorable name <color=#ffd34c>Ozymandias</color> have now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What more meaning would the dishonorable name <color=#ffd34c>Ozymandias</color> have now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What more meaning would the dishonorable name <color=#ffd34c>Ozymandias</color> have now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's my principle to not spare anyone who has seen me behind the stage, but.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's my principle to not spare anyone who has seen me behind the stage, but.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's my principle to not spare anyone who has seen me behind the stage, but.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since you've entertained me, I'll let you live on a whim.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since you've entertained me, I'll let you live on a whim.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since you've entertained me, I'll let you live on a whim.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The main performance will soon start, anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The main performance will soon start, anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The main performance will soon start, anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That damn woman. I'll make her regret mocking me to the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That damn woman. I'll make her regret mocking me to the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...That damn woman. I'll make her regret mocking me to the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So just back off and let me do what I want!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So just back off and let me do what I want!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So just back off and let me do what I want!

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Glad to see you're still standing, Dame Leonhardt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Glad to see you're still standing, Dame Leonhardt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Glad to see you're still standing, Dame Leonhardt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard you were unconscious for a while, but it looks like you're doing better now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard you were unconscious for a while, but it looks like you're doing better now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard you were unconscious for a while, but it looks like you're doing better now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-who are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-who are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-who are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Medea, here on behalf of the Zodiac Knights. I just wanted to check in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm Medea, here on behalf of the Zodiac Knights. I just wanted to check in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Medea, here on behalf of the Zodiac Knights. I just wanted to check in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry for the surprise, but may I speak with Dame Leonhardt alone?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry for the surprise, but may I speak with Dame Leonhardt alone?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry for the surprise, but may I speak with Dame Leonhardt alone?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. We've known each other a long time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. We've known each other a long time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. We've known each other a long time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If anything happens, I'll make sure to inform you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If anything happens, I'll make sure to inform you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If anything happens, I'll make sure to inform you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well... all right, then.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well... all right, then.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well... all right, then.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please be careful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please be careful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please be careful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ozymandias doesn't seem to be in a good mood...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ozymandias doesn't seem to be in a good mood...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ozymandias doesn't seem to be in a good mood...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be careful. Thanks for the warning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be careful. Thanks for the warning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be careful. Thanks for the warning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha. Careful? Please. You should be worrying about yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha. Careful? Please. You should be worrying about yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha. Careful? Please. You should be worrying about yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oof, harsh. Is that how you greet a concerned friend?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oof, harsh. Is that how you greet a concerned friend?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oof, harsh. Is that how you greet a concerned friend?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was worried sick when I heard you passed out after getting thrashed!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was worried sick when I heard you passed out after getting thrashed!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was worried sick when I heard you passed out after getting thrashed!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh... Ngh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh... Ngh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh... Ngh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I saw the reports. Swan, the famed star of Charade, was behind the Corruption disaster?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I saw the reports. Swan, the famed star of Charade, was behind the Corruption disaster?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I saw the reports. Swan, the famed star of Charade, was behind the Corruption disaster?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Detective Julia, chasing the truth all on her own is impressive, but your opponent's no ordinary actor either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Detective Julia, chasing the truth all on her own is impressive, but your opponent's no ordinary actor either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Detective Julia, chasing the truth all on her own is impressive, but your opponent's no ordinary actor either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From what I hear, it must've been a pretty brutal loss, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: From what I hear, it must've been a pretty brutal loss, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: From what I hear, it must've been a pretty brutal loss, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll win next time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll win next time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll win next time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Really? In that state?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Really? In that state?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Really? In that state?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Buzz off. I'll handle it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Buzz off. I'll handle it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Buzz off. I'll handle it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the angriest I've seen Julia since that day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the angriest I've seen Julia since that day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the angriest I've seen Julia since that day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe it's thanks to Richard being around, or maybe it just reminded you of the past?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe it's thanks to Richard being around, or maybe it just reminded you of the past?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe it's thanks to Richard being around, or maybe it just reminded you of the past?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Say one more word, and I'll rip off that damn mouth of yours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Say one more word, and I'll rip off that damn mouth of yours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Say one more word, and I'll rip off that damn mouth of yours.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Too late. You know Swan's a nationally wanted fugitive now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Too late. You know Swan's a nationally wanted fugitive now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Too late. You know Swan's a nationally wanted fugitive now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone's out for her blood. You think you're getting that revenge all by yourself?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone's out for her blood. You think you're getting that revenge all by yourself?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone's out for her blood. You think you're getting that revenge all by yourself?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't need your help to catch her, Ozymandias.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't need your help to catch her, Ozymandias.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't need your help to catch her, Ozymandias.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why you wench!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why you wench!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why you wench!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you. One more word and I'll rip off that damn mouth of yours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you. One more word and I'll rip off that damn mouth of yours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you. One more word and I'll rip off that damn mouth of yours.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...But.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...But.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...But.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We still need you, Julia Leonhardt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We still need you, Julia Leonhardt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We still need you, Julia Leonhardt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about? Got smacked once and now you're sucking up?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about? Got smacked once and now you're sucking up?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about? Got smacked once and now you're sucking up?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know it too. Red Shift attacked the Order.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know it too. Red Shift attacked the Order.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know it too. Red Shift attacked the Order.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration's main forces are tied up protecting the Seniors from Swan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration's main forces are tied up protecting the Seniors from Swan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration's main forces are tied up protecting the Seniors from Swan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: TASKFORCEs are stretched thin across the map dealing with nonstop Corruption disasters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: TASKFORCEs are stretched thin across the map dealing with nonstop Corruption disasters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: TASKFORCEs are stretched thin across the map dealing with nonstop Corruption disasters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if the Order cries for help, the odds of getting real support are zero.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if the Order cries for help, the odds of getting real support are zero.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if the Order cries for help, the odds of getting real support are zero.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that's my problem because...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that's my problem because...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that's my problem because...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hate to admit it, but I've realized something. I'm not leadership material.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hate to admit it, but I've realized something. I'm not leadership material.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hate to admit it, but I've realized something. I'm not leadership material.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And with just Fione's skill... she can't stand against that man.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And with just Fione's skill... she can't stand against that man.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And with just Fione's skill... she can't stand against that man.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Order needs you. <color=#ffd34c>Deputy</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Order needs you. <color=#ffd34c>Deputy</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Order needs you. <color=#ffd34c>Deputy</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy, my foot. If you all die brawling, what's that got to do with me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy, my foot. If you all die brawling, what's that got to do with me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy, my foot. If you all die brawling, what's that got to do with me?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Ever since that day, I've been done with the Order. If this is some dumb recruitment pitch
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Ever since that day, I've been done with the Order. If this is some dumb recruitment pitch
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Ever since that day, I've been done with the Order. If this is some dumb recruitment pitch
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have to protect it. This time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have to protect it. This time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have to protect it. This time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you going to let it fall apart again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you going to let it fall apart again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you going to let it fall apart again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because I believe in him... I came to you after leaving the Order.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because I believe in him... I came to you after leaving the Order.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because I believe in him... I came to you after leaving the Order.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He once told me that <color=#ffd34c>Julia</color> is someone I could trust.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He once told me that <color=#ffd34c>Julia</color> is someone I could trust.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He once told me that <color=#ffd34c>Julia</color> is someone I could trust.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you've discovered something, it's best to share it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you've discovered something, it's best to share it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you've discovered something, it's best to share it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even Grade S Counters can't solve everything alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even Grade S Counters can't solve everything alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even Grade S Counters can't solve everything alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooouch... I'm delicate, you know? Be gentle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooouch... I'm delicate, you know? Be gentle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooouch... I'm delicate, you know? Be gentle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Delicate? Your hand's red from grabbing my collar so hard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Delicate? Your hand's red from grabbing my collar so hard.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Delicate? Your hand's red from grabbing my collar so hard.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh no. Are you developing a skin condition? Better get that checked.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh no. Are you developing a skin condition? Better get that checked.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh no. Are you developing a skin condition? Better get that checked.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I swear, you're giving me a headache.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I swear, you're giving me a headache.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I swear, you're giving me a headache.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where are you going?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where are you going?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where are you going?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why? So you can follow?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why? So you can follow?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why? So you can follow?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever I do is my business. Mind your own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever I do is my business. Mind your own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever I do is my business. Mind your own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're so bad at being honest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're so bad at being honest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're so bad at being honest.

root.m_Talk_FRA: It's my principle to not spare anyone who has seen me behind the stage, but.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since you've entertained me, I'll let you live on a whim.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since you've entertained me, I'll let you live on a whim.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since you've entertained me, I'll let you live on a whim.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The main performance will soon start, anyway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The main performance will soon start, anyway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The main performance will soon start, anyway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...That damn woman. I'll make her regret mocking me to the end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...That damn woman. I'll make her regret mocking me to the end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...That damn woman. I'll make her regret mocking me to the end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So just back off and let me do what I want!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So just back off and let me do what I want!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So just back off and let me do what I want!

root.m_Talk_ENG: B-but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: B-but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: B-but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Glad to see you're still standing, Dame Leonhardt.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Glad to see you're still standing, Dame Leonhardt.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Glad to see you're still standing, Dame Leonhardt.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard you were unconscious for a while, but it looks like you're doing better now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard you were unconscious for a while, but it looks like you're doing better now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard you were unconscious for a while, but it looks like you're doing better now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-who are you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-who are you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-who are you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Medea, here on behalf of the Zodiac Knights. I just wanted to check in.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm Medea, here on behalf of the Zodiac Knights. I just wanted to check in.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Medea, here on behalf of the Zodiac Knights. I just wanted to check in.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry for the surprise, but may I speak with Dame Leonhardt alone?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry for the surprise, but may I speak with Dame Leonhardt alone?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry for the surprise, but may I speak with Dame Leonhardt alone?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. We've known each other a long time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. We've known each other a long time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. We've known each other a long time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If anything happens, I'll make sure to inform you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If anything happens, I'll make sure to inform you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If anything happens, I'll make sure to inform you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well... all right, then.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well... all right, then.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well... all right, then.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please be careful.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please be careful.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please be careful.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ozymandias doesn't seem to be in a good mood...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ozymandias doesn't seem to be in a good mood...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ozymandias doesn't seem to be in a good mood...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be careful. Thanks for the warning.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be careful. Thanks for the warning.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be careful. Thanks for the warning.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha. Careful? Please. You should be worrying about yourself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha. Careful? Please. You should be worrying about yourself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha. Careful? Please. You should be worrying about yourself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oof, harsh. Is that how you greet a concerned friend?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oof, harsh. Is that how you greet a concerned friend?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oof, harsh. Is that how you greet a concerned friend?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was worried sick when I heard you passed out after getting thrashed!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was worried sick when I heard you passed out after getting thrashed!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was worried sick when I heard you passed out after getting thrashed!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh... Ngh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh... Ngh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh... Ngh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I saw the reports. Swan, the famed star of Charade, was behind the Corruption disaster?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I saw the reports. Swan, the famed star of Charade, was behind the Corruption disaster?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I saw the reports. Swan, the famed star of Charade, was behind the Corruption disaster?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Detective Julia, chasing the truth all on her own is impressive, but your opponent's no ordinary actor either.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Detective Julia, chasing the truth all on her own is impressive, but your opponent's no ordinary actor either.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Detective Julia, chasing the truth all on her own is impressive, but your opponent's no ordinary actor either.

root.m_Talk_ENG: From what I hear, it must've been a pretty brutal loss, huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: From what I hear, it must've been a pretty brutal loss, huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: From what I hear, it must've been a pretty brutal loss, huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll win next time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll win next time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll win next time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Really? In that state?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Really? In that state?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Really? In that state?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Buzz off. I'll handle it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Buzz off. I'll handle it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Buzz off. I'll handle it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is the angriest I've seen Julia since that day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is the angriest I've seen Julia since that day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is the angriest I've seen Julia since that day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe it's thanks to Richard being around, or maybe it just reminded you of the past?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe it's thanks to Richard being around, or maybe it just reminded you of the past?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe it's thanks to Richard being around, or maybe it just reminded you of the past?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Say one more word, and I'll rip off that damn mouth of yours.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Say one more word, and I'll rip off that damn mouth of yours.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Say one more word, and I'll rip off that damn mouth of yours.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Too late. You know Swan's a nationally wanted fugitive now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Too late. You know Swan's a nationally wanted fugitive now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Too late. You know Swan's a nationally wanted fugitive now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone's out for her blood. You think you're getting that revenge all by yourself?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone's out for her blood. You think you're getting that revenge all by yourself?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone's out for her blood. You think you're getting that revenge all by yourself?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't need your help to catch her, Ozymandias.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't need your help to catch her, Ozymandias.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't need your help to catch her, Ozymandias.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why you wench!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why you wench!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why you wench!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I told you. One more word and I'll rip off that damn mouth of yours.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I told you. One more word and I'll rip off that damn mouth of yours.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I told you. One more word and I'll rip off that damn mouth of yours.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...But.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...But.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...But.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We still need you, Julia Leonhardt.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We still need you, Julia Leonhardt.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We still need you, Julia Leonhardt.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about? Got smacked once and now you're sucking up?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about? Got smacked once and now you're sucking up?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about? Got smacked once and now you're sucking up?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know it too. Red Shift attacked the Order.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know it too. Red Shift attacked the Order.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know it too. Red Shift attacked the Order.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration's main forces are tied up protecting the Seniors from Swan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration's main forces are tied up protecting the Seniors from Swan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration's main forces are tied up protecting the Seniors from Swan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: TASKFORCEs are stretched thin across the map dealing with nonstop Corruption disasters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: TASKFORCEs are stretched thin across the map dealing with nonstop Corruption disasters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: TASKFORCEs are stretched thin across the map dealing with nonstop Corruption disasters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if the Order cries for help, the odds of getting real support are zero.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if the Order cries for help, the odds of getting real support are zero.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if the Order cries for help, the odds of getting real support are zero.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And that's my problem because...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And that's my problem because...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And that's my problem because...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hate to admit it, but I've realized something. I'm not leadership material.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hate to admit it, but I've realized something. I'm not leadership material.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hate to admit it, but I've realized something. I'm not leadership material.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And with just Fione's skill... she can't stand against that man.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And with just Fione's skill... she can't stand against that man.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And with just Fione's skill... she can't stand against that man.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Order needs you. <color=#ffd34c>Deputy</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Order needs you. <color=#ffd34c>Deputy</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Order needs you. <color=#ffd34c>Deputy</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy, my foot. If you all die brawling, what's that got to do with me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy, my foot. If you all die brawling, what's that got to do with me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy, my foot. If you all die brawling, what's that got to do with me?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Ever since that day, I've been done with the Order. If this is some dumb recruitment pitch
8g

Ever since that day, I've been done with the Order. If this is some dumb recruitment pitch
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Ever since that day, I've been done with the Order. If this is some dumb recruitment pitch

root.m_Talk_ENG: You have to protect it. This time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You have to protect it. This time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You have to protect it. This time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you going to let it fall apart again?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you going to let it fall apart again?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you going to let it fall apart again?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because I believe in him... I came to you after leaving the Order.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because I believe in him... I came to you after leaving the Order.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because I believe in him... I came to you after leaving the Order.

root.m_Talk_ENG: He once told me that <color=#ffd34c>Julia</color> is someone I could trust.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He once told me that <color=#ffd34c>Julia</color> is someone I could trust.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He once told me that <color=#ffd34c>Julia</color> is someone I could trust.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you've discovered something, it's best to share it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you've discovered something, it's best to share it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you've discovered something, it's best to share it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even Grade S Counters can't solve everything alone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even Grade S Counters can't solve everything alone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even Grade S Counters can't solve everything alone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ooouch... I'm delicate, you know? Be gentle.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ooouch... I'm delicate, you know? Be gentle.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ooouch... I'm delicate, you know? Be gentle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Delicate? Your hand's red from grabbing my collar so hard.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Delicate? Your hand's red from grabbing my collar so hard.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Delicate? Your hand's red from grabbing my collar so hard.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh no. Are you developing a skin condition? Better get that checked.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh no. Are you developing a skin condition? Better get that checked.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh no. Are you developing a skin condition? Better get that checked.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I swear, you're giving me a headache.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I swear, you're giving me a headache.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I swear, you're giving me a headache.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where are you going?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where are you going?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where are you going?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why? So you can follow?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why? So you can follow?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why? So you can follow?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever I do is my business. Mind your own.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever I do is my business. Mind your own.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever I do is my business. Mind your own.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're so bad at being honest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're so bad at being honest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're so bad at being honest.
